name: solforge
description: Static developer, text, media and Korean life tools.

scripts.build: node scripts/build-i18n.js && node sites/crypto/scripts/build.js && node sites/stocks/scripts/build.js && node sites/fortune/scripts/build.js
scripts.check: node --check assets/js/app.js && node --check assets/js/tool-catalog.js && node --check assets/js/get-url-parser.js && node --check assets/js/utility-tools.js && node --check assets/js/file-media-tools.js && node --check assets/js/advanced-tools.mjs && node --check assets/js/gaming-lab.js && node --check assets/js/gaming-calculators.js && node --check assets/js/device-diagnostics.js && node --check assets/js/display-diagnostics.js && node --check assets/js/exchange-rates.js && node --check assets/js/input-training.js && node --check assets/js/performance-lab.js && node --check assets/js/world-holidays.js && node --check assets/js/npm-package-info.js && node --check assets/js/crypto-sentiment.js && node --check assets/js/stock-market.js && node --check assets/js/mapleland-boss-timer.js && node --check assets/js/pip-tools.js && node scripts/check-get-url-parser.js && node --check sites/shared/build-content-site.js && node sites/crypto/scripts/check.js && node sites/stocks/scripts/check.js && node sites/fortune/scripts/check.js && node scripts/check-site-network.js
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm exec -- wrangler deploy
scripts.deploy:crypto: npm run build:crypto && npm exec -- wrangler pages deploy --cwd sites/crypto
scripts.deploy:stocks: npm run build:stocks && npm exec -- wrangler pages deploy --cwd sites/stocks
scripts.deploy:fortune: npm run build:fortune && npm exec -- wrangler pages deploy --cwd sites/fortune
